name: Event Speaker Agreement
description: A contract between an event organizer and a guest speaker detailing presentation requirements, compensation, and recording rights.
content:
EVENT SPEAKER AGREEMENT

This Event Speaker Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Event Organizer ("Organizer") and the Speaker named below, regarding the Speaker's participation in the event known as {{event_name}}.

1. THE PARTIES

A. Organizer:
Name/Company: {{organizer_name}}
Address: {{organizer_address}}
Contact Person: {{organizer_contact}}
Email: {{organizer_email}}

B. Speaker:
Name: {{speaker_name}}
Title/Organization: {{speaker_title_org}}
Address: {{speaker_address}}
Email: {{speaker_email}}

2. EVENT AND PRESENTATION DETAILS

Event Name: {{event_name}}
Event Date: {{formatDate event_date}}
Event Location / Platform: {{event_location}}
Presentation Title/Topic: {{presentation_title}}
Time of Presentation: {{presentation_time}}
Duration: {{presentation_duration}} minutes

3. SPEAKER OBLIGATIONS

  • The Speaker agrees to present on the agreed-upon topic at the specified time and location.
  • The presentation shall follow the agreed outline: {{presentation_summary}}.
    • {{#if (eq materials_required 'Yes')}}
  • The Speaker must provide any presentation materials (e.g., slides, handouts) to the Organizer no later than {{materials_deadline}}.
    • {{/if}}
  • The Speaker acts as an independent contractor and not as an employee of the Organizer.

4. ORGANIZER OBLIGATIONS

  • The Organizer will provide the necessary technical equipment, including: {{technical_equipment}}.
  • The Organizer will promote the Speaker's participation in the event's marketing materials.
    • {{#if (eq is_compensated 'Yes')}}
  • The Organizer agrees to pay the Speaker the fee specified in Section 5.
    • {{/if}} {{#if (eq expenses_covered 'Yes')}}
  • The Organizer agrees to reimburse the Speaker for reasonable expenses as specified in Section 5.
    • {{/if}}

5. COMPENSATION AND EXPENSES

{{#if (eq is_compensated 'Yes')}}

Speaker Fee: The Organizer will pay the Speaker a total fee of {{speaker_fee}}. Payment shall be made via {{payment_method}} on or before {{payment_timing}}.

{{else}}

The Speaker agrees to participate in this event on a voluntary/pro-bono basis without expectation of a speaking fee.

{{/if}} {{#if (eq expenses_covered 'Yes')}}

Expenses: The Organizer will reimburse the Speaker for the following documented, out-of-pocket expenses:

{{covered_expenses}}
{{/if}}

6. CANCELLATION POLICY

In the event of cancellation by either party, the following terms shall apply: {{cancellation_policy}}

7. RECORDING AND MEDIA RIGHTS

The Organizer {{#if (eq recording_rights 'Yes')}}IS granted the right to record (audio and/or video) the Speaker's presentation for the purpose of {{recording_purpose}}. The rights to use and distribute this recording shall belong to {{recording_ownership}}.{{else}}IS NOT granted the right to record the Speaker's presentation without further written consent.{{/if}}

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

For the Organizer
{{organizer_contact}}

Signature: _________________________

Speaker
{{speaker_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: is_compensated
fields.label: Will the Speaker be paid a fee?

fields.name: covered_expenses
fields.label: Covered Expenses (If Yes)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Economy flights, 1 night hotel stay.

fields.name: cancellation_policy
fields.label: Cancellation Policy
fields.placeholder: What happens if the speaker or organizer cancels?

fields.name: recording_rights
fields.label: Can the Organizer record the presentation?
